title: Monitor and review business performance
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Monitor and review business performance demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify performance requirements

pcs.text: Develop realistic performance indicators within available timeframes and resources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop realistic performance indicators within available timeframes and resources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop realistic performance indicators within available timeframes and resources.

pcs.text: Identify and minimise factors inhibiting performance against objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and minimise factors inhibiting performance against objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and minimise factors inhibiting performance against objectives.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify capacity to promote the sustainability of operations and incorporate into enterprise procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate enterprise strengths and weaknesses against market conditions to determine current and future capacities.
